name: send_email
description: Composes and sends an email to one or more recipients on behalf of the authenticated user.

subject.description: The subject line of the email.

body.description: The body content of the email, plain text or HTML depending on is_html.

cc.description: Optional list of email addresses to CC.

bcc.description: Optional list of email addresses to BCC.

is_html.description: If true, the body is rendered as HTML. Defaults to false.
